query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: An overhead view of a grave marker engraved with the name "THEODORE SCH..." and an image of the Statue of Liberty, surrounded by memorial offerings on a gravel surface. Items placed on and around the stone include artificial blue roses, artificial pink and red roses, a white ceramic animal figurine, a small white angel statue, a translucent plastic container with what appears to be bread inside, a small robed religious figurine with a blue cloak, and numerous colorful toy cars scattered across the marker.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A casually captured overhead snapshot of a grave marker engraved with the name "THEODORE SCH..." and an image of the Statue of Liberty, surrounded by memorial offerings on a gravel surface. The image exhibits amateur snapshot energy through its accidental tilt, tight awkward framing that cuts off the gravestone text, and crowded informal composition. Items include artificial blue roses, artificial pink and red roses, a white ceramic animal figurine, a small white angel statue, a translucent plastic container with what appears to be bread inside, a small robed religious figurine with a blue cloak, and numerous colorful toy cars scattered across the marker, all rendered with the unplanned quality of vernacular photography.
